---
title: ""
format:
  pdf:
    toc: false
    pdf-engine: lualatex
    geometry: margin=1in
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{enumitem}
        \setlist[itemize]{leftmargin=*, topsep=2pt, itemsep=1pt}
        \usepackage{parskip}
        \setlength{\parindent}{0pt}
        \usepackage{titlesec}

        \titleformat{\subsection}
          {\large\bfseries}
          {}
          {0em}
          {}[\titlerule]
        \titlespacing*{\subsection}{0pt}{1.2em}{0.7em}
---

```{=latex}
\begin{center}
{\LARGE \textbf{James C. C. Butler}}\\
\vspace{0.6em}
jamesccbutler@gmail.com \;·\; +353 089 250 5361 \;·\; Ireland \;·\; Dual UK / US citizen \;·\; \url{linkedin.com/in/jamescbutler}
\end{center}

\vspace{0.5em}
```

Bioinformatician and machine learning researcher developing generative and transformer-based models to learn predictive structure from high-dimensional biological data.

## Education

```{=latex}
\noindent
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.85\textwidth}
\textbf{University College Cork}, \emph{PhD Computer Science \& Microbiology (Marie-Curie Fellow)}\\
Advisor: Marcus Claesson \;|\; Thesis: ``Generative Modelling and Transformer-Based Sequence Learning for Microbiome Analysis''
\end{minipage}%
\hfill
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.15\textwidth}
\raggedleft \textbf{2021--2026}
\end{minipage}

\vspace{0.6em}

\noindent
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.85\textwidth}
\textbf{University of St Andrews}, \emph{MSc Applied Statistics \& Datamining (Distinction)}\\
Advisor: Carl Donovan \;|\; Thesis: ``Synthetic Data for Training Convolutional Neural Networks''
\end{minipage}%
\hfill
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.15\textwidth}
\raggedleft \textbf{2019--2020}
\end{minipage}

\vspace{0.6em}

\noindent
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.85\textwidth}
\textbf{Harvard University}, \emph{BA Economics}\\
Secondary Field in Visual Environmental Studies
\end{minipage}%
\hfill
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.15\textwidth}
\raggedleft \textbf{2011--2015}
\end{minipage}
```

## Research Experience

```{=latex}
\noindent
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.85\textwidth}
\textbf{Imperial College London}, \emph{Research Assistant (NIHR Applied Research Collaboration)}\\
Designed and conducted statistical analyses to identify system-level challenges across health and social care, informing targeted interventions and evaluation strategies.
\end{minipage}%
\hfill
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.15\textwidth}
\raggedleft \textbf{2020--2021}
\end{minipage}

\vspace{0.6em}

\noindent
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.85\textwidth}
\textbf{University of Pennsylvania}, \emph{Research Assistant, Biomechanics Lab}\\
Contributed to research on lung injury prevention via reactive oxygen species; conducted experimental data collection and analysis on lung and brain pathologies.
\end{minipage}%
\hfill
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.15\textwidth}
\raggedleft \textbf{2011--2012}
\end{minipage}
```

## Professional Experience

```{=latex}

\noindent
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.85\textwidth}
\textbf{Univeristy College Cork}, \emph{Course Demonstrator}\\
Computational Biology (UG); Systems Biology, Genomic Data Analysis (MSc)\\
Designed and assessed problem sets; supported lab teaching and computational assignments
\end{minipage}%
\hfill
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.15\textwidth}
\raggedleft \textbf{2021--2024}
\end{minipage}

\vspace{0.6em}

\noindent
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.85\textwidth}
\textbf{Harvard University}, \emph{Teaching Assistant \& Guest Speaker}\\
Teaching assistant for Game Theory; guest lecturer on leadership and entrepreneurship.
\end{minipage}%
\hfill
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.15\textwidth}
\raggedleft \textbf{2018}
\end{minipage}

\vspace{0.6em}

\noindent
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.85\textwidth}
\textbf{DMP Statistical Solutions UK Ltd}, \emph{Statistical Consultant}\\
Designed web applications and delivered statistical reports for industry clients including L'Oréal and Raymond James.
\end{minipage}%
\hfill
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.15\textwidth}
\raggedleft \textbf{2020--2022}
\end{minipage}

\vspace{0.6em}

\noindent
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.85\textwidth}
\textbf{Le Grand Verre Wines}, \emph{Co-founder, President \& Board Member, CMO}\\
Led market entry and growth strategy for a premium French wine company across the US and Europe; secured \$60,000 investment and established key accounts in NYC and LA.
\end{minipage}%
\hfill
\begin{minipage}[t]{0.15\textwidth}
\raggedleft \textbf{2015--2019}
\end{minipage}
```

## Technical Skills
```{=latex}
\textbf{Programming:} Python (PyTorch, HF), R, Bash\\
\textbf{Machine Learning:} Transformers, diffusion models, GANs, representation learning, set-based models\\
\textbf{Statistics:} GLMs, multivariate analysis, dimensionality reduction\\
\textbf{Bioinformatics:} Metagenomics, tokenisation, microbiome statistical analysis\\
\vspace{-1em}
```

## Interests
Generative AI for creative applications (animation, music); Running (2 marathons, 3:13 PB)
